indicators.name: folding cot against wall
indicators.rationale: A cot provides a minimal horizontal rest surface, though its size and location are far from ideal for sleep.

indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces of the furniture and flooring are incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: The open layout with no walls or dividers makes it difficult to achieve a sense of enclosure and privacy.

indicators.name: bright artificial lighting
indicators.rationale: Bright artificial lighting is incompatible with sleep, as it can disrupt circadian rhythms.

reasoning_summary: This is a commercial office space with minimal support for primary sleep. The presence of a cot is the only indication of a rest area, but the hard industrial surfaces, open layout, and bright artificial lighting make this a poor environment for sleep.
